name: io.github.Mnymann/nordic-data
description: Official European business data for AI agents: company registries, KYB, VAT validation (VIES/HMRC), sanctions screening (UN/EU/OFAC/PEP), LEI lookup and address autocomplete across 15 EU countries (DK, NO, SE, FI, IE, UK, FR, DE, CZ, PL, LV, EE, NL, BE, LU).

environmentVariables.name: NORDIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Nordic Data API key — get one at https://addonnordic.com (free tier: 100 lookups/day)

environmentVariables.name: NORDIC_DEFAULT_COUNTRY
environmentVariables.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (lowercase) to assume when a tool call omits the country argument. One of: dk, no, se, fi, ie, uk, fr, de, cz, pl, lv, ee, nl, be, lu.

environmentVariables.name: NORDIC_VERBOSE_ERRORS
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Set to 'true' to include upstream HTTP status and request-id details in error messages. Useful for debugging.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer ndk_... — your personal API key from https://addonnordic.com
